creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to c.kworr from comment #1)
(In reply to sasamotikomi from comment #2)
Do i need provide some additional information?
# pkg info mpv
mpv-0.8.3,1
Name           : mpv
Version        : 0.8.3,1
Installed on   : Sat Mar 28 05:01:49 2015
Origin         : multimedia/mpv
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:32
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : multimedia audio
Licenses       : GPLv2
Maintainer     : gblach@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://mpv.io/
Comment        : Free and open-source general-purpose video player
Options        :
        BS2B           : off
        CACA           : off
        CDIO           : off
        DOCS           : on
        ENCA           : off
        JACK           : off
        LADSPA         : off

        LIBBLURAY      : off

Shared Libs required:
        libswscale.so.2

        libjpeg.so.8
        libdvdread.so.4
        libdvdnav.so.4
        libavutil.so.52

        libavfilter.so.4

        libass.so.5
        libXv.so.1

Annotations    :

        repository     : FreeBSD
Flat size      : 2.42MiB
Description    :
Mpv is a free and open-source general-purpose video player.
Mpv is based on the MPlayer and mplayer2 projects which it greatly improves.

WWW: http://mpv.io/
